```yaml
            return std::string(buf);
      - lvgl.bar.update:
          id: bar_day
          value: !lambda "return id(brew_day);"
      - lvgl.label.update:
          id: lbl_day_val
          text: !lambda |-
            char buf[10];
            snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "Day %d/14", id(brew_day));
            return std::string(buf);

font:
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_brand
    size: 22
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_body
    size: 18
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_small
    size: 14
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_value
    size: 32

display:
  - platform: mipi_spi
    model: AXS15231
    id: lcd
    spi_id: lcd_spi
    cs_pin: GPIO45
    dimensions:
      width: 320
      height: 480
    color_order: rgb
    invert_colors: false
    data_rate: 40MHz
    update_interval: never
    auto_clear_enabled: false

lvgl:
  displays:
    - lcd
  pages:
    - id: brew_page
      bg_color: 0x000000
      bg_opa: COVER
      pad_all: 0
      radius: 0
      border_width: 0
      widgets:
        # Header card
        - obj:
            x: 8
            y: 8
            width: 304
            height: 60
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 12
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Kru32 Brewing"
                  text_color: 0xFFFFFF
                  text_font: font_brand
              - obj:
                  align: TOP_RIGHT
                  width: 90
                  height: 24
                  bg_color: 0x0A1419
                  bg_opa: COVER
                  border_width: 1
                  border_color: 0x00FF7F
                  radius: 12
                  widgets:
                    - label:
                        id: lbl_status
                        align: CENTER
                        text: "ACTIVE"
                        text_color: 0x00FF7F
                        text_font: font_small

        # Day progress card
        - obj:
            x: 8
            y: 76
            width: 304
            height: 100
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 12
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Fermentation Progress"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  id: lbl_day_val
                  align: CENTER
                  y: 5
                  text: "Day 5/14"
                  text_color: 0xFFD27F
                  text_font: font_value
              - bar:
                  id: bar_day
                  align: BOTTOM_MID
                  width: 270
                  height: 10
                  min_value: 0
                  max_value: 14
                  value: 5
                  bg_color: 0x1F1F2F
                  bg_opa: COVER
                  radius: 5
                  indicator:
                    bg_color: 0xFFD27F
                    radius: 5

        # Temperature card
        - obj:
            x: 8
            y: 184
            width: 304
            height: 90
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 12
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Temperature"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  id: lbl_temp_val
                  align: CENTER
                  y: 8
                  text: "22.5 C"
                  text_color: 0xFF6B6B
                  text_font: font_value

        # Recipe card
        - obj:
            x: 8
            y: 282
            width: 148
            height: 90
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 10
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Batch Size"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: CENTER
                  y: 10
                  text: "23 L"
                  text_color: 0x4FB3FF
                  text_font: font_body

        - obj:
            x: 164
            y: 282
            width: 148
            height: 90
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 10
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Target ABV"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: CENTER
                  y: 10
                  text: "5.2%"
                  text_color: 0x4FB3FF
                  text_font: font_body

        # Style info
        - obj:
            x: 8
            y: 380
            width: 304
            height: 60
            bg_color: 0x0A1419
            bg_opa: COVER
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            radius: 12
            pad_all: 12
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Style: IPA"
                  text_color: 0xFFFFFF
                  text_font: font_body
              - label:
                  align: BOTTOM_LEFT
                  text: "Grain: 5.2 kg"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
```

## YAML source — บท 15 Production Ready

File: `lessons/15-production/production.yaml`

```yaml
# production.yaml — บทที่ 16: Production Config — safe mode + fallback + OTA
#
# บอร์ด: Guition JC3248W535 (ESP32-S3, AXS15231B 320x480 QSPI)
# เป้าหมาย: config ที่พร้อม deploy จริง — wifi fallback AP, safe mode,
#            OTA update, status page, captive portal
#            เรียนรู้ว่า config "production" ต่างจาก "dev" ยังไง
#
#   uvx esphome compile production.yaml

esphome:
  name: kru32-production
  friendly_name: Kru32 Production
  on_boot:
    priority: 600
    then:
      - light.turn_on:
          id: backlight
          brightness: 80%

esp32:
  board: esp32-s3-devkitc-1
  variant: esp32s3
  flash_size: 16MB
  framework:
    type: esp-idf

psram:
  mode: octal
  speed: 80MHz

logger:
  level: WARN
  hardware_uart: USB_SERIAL_JTAG

# wifi: เปลี่ยน ssid/password เป็นของจริงก่อน deploy
wifi:
  ssid: kru32-dev
  password: kru32pass123
  ap:
    ssid: "Kru32-Fallback"
    password: "kru32fallback"
  power_save_mode: LIGHT

improv_serial:

captive_portal:

ota:
  - platform: esphome
    password: "kru32-ota-pass"

safe_mode:
  boot_is_good_after: 60s
  num_attempts: 5

i2c:
  - id: touch_i2c
    sda: GPIO4
    scl: GPIO8
    frequency: 400kHz

spi:
  - id: lcd_spi
    type: quad
    clk_pin: GPIO47
    data_pins: [GPIO21, GPIO48, GPIO40, GPIO39]

output:
  - platform: ledc
    pin: GPIO1
    id: backlight_pwm
    frequency: 25000Hz

light:
  - platform: monochromatic
    id: backlight
    name: "Backlight"
    output: backlight_pwm
    restore_mode: ALWAYS_ON

touchscreen:
  - platform: axs15231
    id: my_touch
    interrupt_pin: GPIO3

sensor:
  - platform: uptime
    name: "Uptime"
    id: uptime_sensor
    update_interval: 60s

  - platform: wifi_signal
    name: "WiFi Signal"
    id: wifi_rssi
    update_interval: 60s

text_sensor:
  - platform: wifi_info
    ip_address:
      name: "IP"
      id: wifi_ip
    ssid:
      name: "SSID"
      id: wifi_ssid_info

button:
  - platform: restart
    name: "Restart"

font:
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_title
    size: 22
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_body
    size: 18
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_small
    size: 14

interval:
  - interval: 30s
    then:
      - lvgl.label.update:
          id: lbl_ip
          text: !lambda |-
            if (id(wifi_ip).has_state()) return id(wifi_ip).state;
            return std::string("No WiFi");
      - lvgl.label.update:
          id: lbl_rssi
          text: !lambda |-
            char buf[16];
            snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "%d dBm", (int)id(wifi_rssi).state);
            return std::string(buf);
      - lvgl.label.update:
          id: lbl_uptime
          text: !lambda |-
            int s = (int)id(uptime_sensor).state;
            int h = s / 3600; int m = (s % 3600) / 60;
            char buf[16];
            snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "%dh %dm", h, m);
            return std::string(buf);

display:
  - platform: mipi_spi
    model: AXS15231
    id: lcd
    spi_id: lcd_spi
    cs_pin: GPIO45
    dimensions:
      width: 320
      height: 480
    color_order: rgb
    invert_colors: false
    data_rate: 40MHz
    update_interval: never
    auto_clear_enabled: false

lvgl:
  displays:
    - lcd
  pages:
    - id: status_page
      bg_color: 0x080810
      bg_opa: COVER
      pad_all: 0
      radius: 0
      border_width: 0
      widgets:
        - label:
            align: TOP_MID
            y: 16
            text: "Production Status"
            text_color: 0x00FF7F
            text_font: font_title

        - obj:
            x: 16
            y: 60
            width: 288
            height: 280
            bg_color: 0x0F1420
            bg_opa: COVER
            radius: 14
            border_width: 1
            border_color: 0x1F3540
            pad_all: 16
            widgets:
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  text: "Network"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small

              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 30
                  text: "IP:"
                  text_color: 0x666666
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  id: lbl_ip
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 28
                  x: 40
                  text: "connecting..."
                  text_color: 0x4FB3FF
                  text_font: font_body

              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 65
                  text: "RSSI:"
                  text_color: 0x666666
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  id: lbl_rssi
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 63
                  x: 50
                  text: "-- dBm"
                  text_color: 0xFFD27F
                  text_font: font_body

              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 100
                  text: "Uptime:"
                  text_color: 0x666666
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  id: lbl_uptime
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 98
                  x: 60
                  text: "0h 0m"
                  text_color: 0x00FF7F
                  text_font: font_body

              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 145
                  text: "Features"
                  text_color: 0x888888
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 170
                  text: "OTA: enabled"
                  text_color: 0x00FF7F
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 192
                  text: "Safe Mode: 5 attempts"
                  text_color: 0x00FF7F
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 214
                  text: "Fallback AP: Kru32-Fallback"
                  text_color: 0xFFD27F
                  text_font: font_small
              - label:
                  align: TOP_LEFT
                  y: 236
                  text: "Captive Portal: enabled"
                  text_color: 0x00FF7F
                  text_font: font_small
```

## YAML source — บท 16 GIF Animation

File: `lessons/16-gif-animation/gif-animation.yaml`

```yaml
# gif-animation.yaml — บทที่ 16: GIF Animation Frames
#
# บอร์ด: Guition JC3248W535 (ESP32-S3, AXS15231B 320x480 QSPI)
# เป้าหมาย: เล่น GIF หลายเฟรมด้วย animation: component
#            display update_interval เป็นตัวเดินเฟรม — next_frame() ทุกรอบ
#            (ball.gif สร้างจาก Pillow — ลูกบอลเด้ง 8 เฟรม 96x96)
#
#   uvx esphome compile gif-animation.yaml

esphome:
  name: kru32-gif
  friendly_name: Kru32 GIF

esp32:
  board: esp32-s3-devkitc-1
  variant: esp32s3
  flash_size: 16MB
  framework:
    type: esp-idf

psram:
  mode: octal
  speed: 80MHz

logger:
  level: INFO
  hardware_uart: USB_SERIAL_JTAG

# wifi: เปลี่ยน ssid/password เป็นของคุณเอง
wifi:
  ssid: kru32-dev
  password: kru32pass123

# Improv Serial — ให้หน้า Config WiFi (แยกจาก flash) คุยกับบอร์ดได้
improv_serial:

# ── QSPI bus ──
spi:
  - id: lcd_spi
    type: quad
    clk_pin: GPIO47
    data_pins: [GPIO21, GPIO48, GPIO40, GPIO39]

# ── Backlight ──
output:
  - platform: ledc
    pin: GPIO1
    id: backlight_pwm
    frequency: 25000Hz

light:
  - platform: monochromatic
    id: backlight
    name: "Backlight"
    output: backlight_pwm
    restore_mode: ALWAYS_ON

# ── Animation: GIF 8 เฟรม โหลดเข้า flash ตอน compile ──
animation:
  - file: "ball.gif"
    id: ball_anim
    type: RGB565

# ── Font: ประกาศ glyphs ทุกตัวที่ใช้ ──
font:
  - file: "gfonts://Roboto"
    id: font_label
    size: 24
    glyphs: "Kru32 GIFanimto"

# ── จอ: update_interval 80ms = ตัวเดินเฟรม GIF ──
display:
  - platform: mipi_spi
    model: AXS15231
    id: lcd
    spi_id: lcd_spi
    cs_pin: GPIO45
    dimensions:
      width: 320
      height: 480
    color_order: rgb
    invert_colors: false
    data_rate: 40MHz
    update_interval: 80ms
    lambda: |-
      id(ball_anim).next_frame();
      it.fill(Color::BLACK);
      it.print(160, 60, id(font_label), Color(0xFF, 0xD2, 0x7F),
               TextAlign::CENTER, "Kru32 GIF animation");
      it.image((320 - 96) / 2, (480 - 96) / 2, id(ball_anim));
```
